recommended.name: Y Combinator Startup School
recommended.stacking_notes: Startup School deals are subset of full YC batch. Can stack SUS deals with independent applications.
recommended.notes: Free enrollment. Unlocks partial deal set including AWS $25K, Brex $75K, Notion free, Stripe waived fees even without batch acceptance.

recommended.name: Brex Startup Rewards
recommended.stacking_notes: Brex perks are additive. Brex AWS credits $1K-$5K stack with AWS Activate. Check both Brex and Ramp portals for overlapping deals.
recommended.notes: Anthropic API credits often available via Brex. 7x points on software, 3x on travel. OpenAI/Anthropic credits especially valuable for AI products.

recommended.name: Stripe Atlas Perks
recommended.stacking_notes: Atlas perks are additive to all other programs. AWS $1K Atlas perk stacks with AWS Activate Founders tier.
recommended.notes: Total perk value often 10-20x the $500 Atlas fee. Retroactive access for existing Atlas companies. Perks include AWS $1K, GCP $2K, HubSpot starter free, Gusto 6mo free, Carta $1.5K, 15+ others.

recommended.name: Oregon SBDC Network
recommended.provider: Oregon Small Business Development Center Network
recommended.stacking_notes: SBDC advisors help access and stack other Oregon and federal programs. No monetary limit â€” stacks with everything.
recommended.notes: Free one-on-one business counseling and grant-writing support via 19 SBDC centers at Oregon community colleges and universities. Nevada LLC with Oregon-based operations qualifies â€” eligibility is based on business location not incorporation state. Advisors specifically help with Business Oregon grant applications and federal SBIR/STTR prep. No application required â€” schedule an appointment directly. High ROI: immediate, free, unlocks other programs.

recommended.name: DigitalOcean Hatch
recommended.stacking_notes: Does not conflict with AWS/GCP/Azure. Can run DO workloads in parallel.
recommended.notes: ~30% acceptance rate. Stronger application with deployed product. Best value for simple VPS/containerized workloads.

recommended.name: Oracle for Startups (OCI Credits)
recommended.stacking_notes: Stacks cleanly with all major clouds. OCI Always Free tier (2 VMs, 200GB storage) is perpetual and separate from startup credits.
recommended.notes: OCI has a very generous Always Free tier that never expires. Startup program adds $10K-$300K on top. Autonomous Database free tier excellent for Postgres-compatible workloads.

recommended.name: AWS Activate
recommended.stacking_notes: Cannot stack multiple Activate tiers simultaneously; can apply new credits when prior expire
recommended.notes: Priority service for ML/AI workloads via Bedrock, SageMaker. Check current quota on model training credits.

recommended.name: Google Cloud for Startups
recommended.stacking_notes: Can stack Spark + Ignite if progression; Workspace for Startups can be added separately
recommended.notes: Gemini API credits often available separately via AI Startup Program at cloud.google.com/ai-startups

recommended.name: SBIR / STTR Federal R&D Grants
recommended.stacking_notes: SBIR/STTR does not conflict with commercial startup programs. Many SBIR awardees also have AWS/GCP credits.
recommended.notes: Non-dilutive federal R&D grants. Phase I ~$275K, Phase II up to $1.75M. AI/ML-focused agencies (DoD, NSF, NIH) all fund software. Long cycle time (6 months) but highest non-dilutive value available. Trading Agent and Runway qualify as tech R&D.
recommended.confidence_reason: good fit but long review cycle

recommended.name: Cohere for Startups
recommended.stacking_notes: Stacks with all AI providers. Cohere Command and Embed models are distinct from OpenAI/Anthropic.
recommended.notes: Cohere specializes in enterprise NLP: Embed (search/RAG), Command (generation), Rerank (relevance). Strong for semantic search in BadgeTrack or document apps.

recommended.name: Algolia for Startups
recommended.stacking_notes: Algolia search can be augmented with Cohere semantic embeddings. Stacks with any backend.
recommended.notes: Hosted search-as-a-service. Relevant for Runway program catalog search, BadgeTrack badge discovery, and Yard Sale listing search. Sub-100ms results.

recommended.name: Neon Startup Program
recommended.stacking_notes: Neon is serverless Postgres. Pairs well with Vercel (Edge) or Fly.io. Can replace Render Postgres.
recommended.notes: Neon is serverless, branching Postgres - direct replacement for Render Postgres. Each git branch can have its own DB branch. BadgeTrack uses Postgres already, making migration straightforward.

recommended.name: Microsoft for Startups (Azure + M365)
recommended.stacking_notes: GitHub Advanced Security + Copilot often bundled; stack with LinkedIn Learning 25 seats
recommended.notes: Azure OpenAI Service access included â€” high value for AI-native products. GitHub Copilot often bundled.

recommended.name: Groq Startup Program
recommended.stacking_notes: Groq LPU inference is fastest available (Llama 3, Mixtral). Stacks with any other AI provider.
recommended.notes: Groq is the fastest inference provider available at 500-800 tokens/sec on Llama 3. 10B+ token/month usage makes this high-value for Trading Agent and other AI-heavy builds.

recommended.name: SendGrid Transactional Email Credits
recommended.stacking_notes: SendGrid (transactional email API) stacks with Twilio (SMS/voice) and Customer.io (marketing automation).
recommended.notes: Twilio SendGrid: 40K free emails/day on free plan, startup program unlocks Essentials. Industry standard for transactional email. Python SDK available. Separate product from Twilio SMS.

recommended.name: Hugging Face for Startups
recommended.stacking_notes: Complements AWS/GCP AI credits. HF hosts open-source models while AWS/GCP provide inference infrastructure.
recommended.notes: Inference API, Spaces (GPU apps), AutoTrain (fine-tuning), private repos. Can replace paid API costs with open-source models.

recommended.name: Together AI for Startups
recommended.stacking_notes: Open-source model hosting platform. Stacks with all other AI APIs.
recommended.notes: Together AI runs Llama, Mistral, Qwen, and 100+ open-source models at low cost. Fine-tuning available. Good alternative when OpenAI/Anthropic budgets run out.

recommended.name: Fly.io Startup Credits
recommended.stacking_notes: Excellent direct Render replacement. Deploy Python/Flask containers globally via Dockerfile.
recommended.notes: Fly.io is the closest 1:1 replacement for Render for Python Flask apps. Supports Postgres, Redis, background workers. Free allowances on top of startup credits.

recommended.name: Ramp Corporate Card
recommended.stacking_notes: Run Ramp alongside Mercury banking. Brex and Ramp perks portals have different partner deals â€” check both.
recommended.notes: 1.5% cashback on all spend. No personal guarantee required. Perks include AWS, Stripe, Google Workspace, Gusto. Bill pay and accounting integrations.

recommended.name: Datadog for Startups
recommended.stacking_notes: Additive with cloud provider credits; operates independently
recommended.notes: Pro tier: Infrastructure monitoring (5 hosts), APM (500K traces), Logs (1GB/day). Faster with VC/accelerator endorsement.

recommended.name: Oregon Entrepreneurial Development Loan Fund (EDLF)
recommended.stacking_notes: Loan (not grant) â€” does not reduce equity but must be repaid. Stacks with all grant and credit programs.
recommended.notes: Business Oregon's EDLF provides low-interest loans ($5K-$100K) to Oregon startups and micro-enterprises that can't access conventional bank financing. Not a grant â€” must be repaid â€” but below-market interest rates and flexible terms. Oregon SBDC advisors help with the application. Nevada LLC with Oregon operations qualifies if primary business activity is in Oregon. Good bridge financing while pursuing grants and cloud credits.

recommended.name: Segment for Startups
recommended.stacking_notes: Segment as CDP collects once and routes to any analytics tool. Non-conflicting with analytics platforms â€” layer Segment under them.
recommended.notes: Unlimited sources/destinations, data replay, S3. Collect data once, send anywhere. Pipe customer events into HubSpot, BigQuery automatically.

recommended.name: Business Oregon Innovation Grants
recommended.stacking_notes: State grants stack with federal SBIR/STTR and all commercial programs.
recommended.notes: Oregon-based businesses qualify for Business Oregon grant programs. The Oregon SBDC also offers free consulting and grant-writing support. Nevada LLC with Oregon-based operations may qualify for some programs.

recommended.name: Linear Startup Program
recommended.stacking_notes: Additive with GitHub, Notion, Vercel credits
recommended.notes: Fastest approval of any program. Full Plus plan: unlimited issues, cycles, roadmaps. Free GitHub integration.

recommended.name: Auth0 / Okta for Startups
recommended.stacking_notes: Additive with cloud credits; handles identity layer independently
recommended.notes: 7,500 MAU free. Social login, MFA, SSO, M2M tokens, attack protection. Saves months of custom auth development.

recommended.name: Oregon Regional Innovation Hubs
recommended.provider: Business Oregon / Oregon Innovation Council (Oregon InC)
recommended.stacking_notes: Hubs are facilitators â€” they unlock other programs. Stacks with everything.
recommended.notes: Business Oregon and Oregon InC fund 8 regional innovation hubs statewide ($3.77M awarded 2025-2027 cycle). Hubs include Portland Metro Hub, Southern Oregon Innovation Hub, and others. Each hub provides technical assistance, investor connections, and manages local grant programs for high-growth tech companies. Nevada LLC with Oregon-based operations qualifies. Portland Metro Hub is the primary contact for Portland-area startups. Hubs also run the Oregon AI Accelerator program.

recommended.name: LaunchDarkly Startup Program
recommended.stacking_notes: Feature flags integrate with deployment and monitoring pipelines.
recommended.notes: Feature flag management system. Enables safe rollouts and A/B testing without redeployments. Critical for the self-serve Runway product launch.

recommended.name: New Relic Startup Program
recommended.stacking_notes: New Relic full-stack APM stacks with Sentry (error tracking) and can complement Datadog.
recommended.notes: New Relic free tier is very generous: 100GB/mo data ingest free, 1 free full-access user. Startup program adds credits on top. Full APM, logs, traces, and synthetic monitoring included.

recommended.name: Twilio Startup Program
recommended.stacking_notes: Additive with cloud provider credits; independent
recommended.notes: SendGrid (Twilio-owned) included â€” covers transactional email AND SMS in single credit pool.

recommended.name: Linode / Akamai Cloud Startup Program
recommended.stacking_notes: Stacks with all other cloud platforms. Simple self-serve pricing; great for testing multi-region deployments.
recommended.notes: Simple VPS platform. Nanode 1GB ($5/mo) is among the cheapest ways to host Python Flask apps. Credits stretch to 50 months of base hosting.

recommended.name: Cloudflare for Startups
recommended.stacking_notes: Additive with cloud infrastructure credits (AWS/GCP/Azure do not overlap)
recommended.notes: Full Business plan: CDN, DDoS mitigation, Workers (10M req/day), R2 storage (10GB), Pages, Zero Trust. Zero Trust free up to 50 users.

recommended.name: Figma for Startups
recommended.stacking_notes: Additive with all other credits; design is independent from infra/analytics stack
recommended.notes: Full Professional plan: unlimited files, version history, Dev Mode. FigJam included for architecture diagrams.

recommended.name: Replicate Startup Program
recommended.stacking_notes: Stacks with all other AI providers. Unique for image/video/audio generation models.
recommended.notes: Replicate specializes in image/video/audio generation models (Stable Diffusion, etc). Useful if apps need media generation capabilities.

recommended.name: Anthropic Claude API Credits
recommended.stacking_notes: Credits from different sources applied sequentially. Combine with OpenAI for multi-provider AI coverage.
recommended.notes: Fastest path: Brex account (instant via portal). Watch for AI-focused accelerator cohort perks.
recommended.confidence_reason: strong match; get gateway enrolled first
